title: paronychia johnstonii var. scabrida
intro: Paronychia johnstonii var. scabrida, a variety of the Paronychia johnstonii plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae, commonly known as the 'Bladderpod' plant. It is native to the Americas and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Paronychia johnstonii var. scabrida include treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as having anti-diarrheal and anti-flatulent properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to treat various health issues, and it can also be dried and used in poultices or salves for topical application.
